Remento.ad_copy: With Remento, preserving precious stories is as easy as having a conversation. They will simply speak, and Remento will do the rest. Turning their spoken words into professionally written stories. Each story is paired with a QR code that when scanned, links back to original recordings. This way, you can watch or listen to them anytime as they tell their story. 👆 Pick storytelling prompts/photos 📱 Record spoken answers
Remento.headline: 📖 Remento turns recordings into a book of written stories

Remento.ad_copy: Most families have boxes of old photos sitting in closets, attics, or drawers. That’s why we love this partnership: 📸 Legacybox helps digitize and preserve old family photos.
Remento.headline: 🎙️ Remento captures the stories behind those photos - in your loved one’s own voice.

Remento.ad_copy: Sometimes you don’t realize how much you want family stories saved until you’re watching your own babies make memories with the people you love most. One of the most special parts of becoming a mom has been watching my twin boys with their grandfather… my Baba. I always knew I wanted Hudson and Caspian to grow up knowing his stories from the funny ones, the untold ones from his life Iran, and the ones that shaped who he is. That’s why Remento feels so meaningful to me. It makes it easy to capture those stories in his own voice, so one day my boys can hear them straight from Baba 🩵 #RementoPartner @getremento

ElliQ.ad_copy: What if the way we think about aging actually impacts how we age? The research suggests it does. Positive aging isn’t just a mindset. It can shape real outcomes.
